events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The picture is a jewelry store, the upper left corner is the cashier, there is a man in black, a woman in black and a little girl in black in the center of the picture.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 5.3s, the picture is a jewelry store, the upper left corner is the cashier, there is a man in black, a woman in black and a little girl in black in the center of the picture.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; In the picture, the man in black and the woman in black are looking at jewelry at the counter.
events.event_text: From 3.2s to 12.1s, in the picture, the man in black and the woman in black are looking at jewelry at the counter.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; The little girl in black walked to the gap in the middle counter and looked around, squatted down and entered the counter, walked to the table on the right and opened the drawer.
events.event_text: From 3.2s to 12.1s, the little girl in black walked to the gap in the middle counter and looked around, squatted down and entered the counter, walked to the table on the right and opened the drawer.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The little girl in black rummaged through the things in the drawer, took out some things and closed the drawer, sat on the ground and stuffed the things she took out into her clothes.
events.event_text: From 13.3s to 19.3s, the little girl in black rummaged through the things in the drawer, took out some things and closed the drawer, sat on the ground and stuffed the things she took out into her clothes.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The woman in black walked to the counter in the upper left corner, and the little girl immediately walked out of the counter and left in the lower left corner.
events.event_text: From 19.3s to 27.2s, the woman in black walked to the counter in the upper left corner, and the little girl immediately walked out of the counter and left in the lower left corner.
